title: Setup Frontend Project
description: Initialize the React/Vite/TypeScript frontend project, configure linting, and establish basic project structure (e.g., src/, components/, views/, services/).
ai_instructions: You are a frontend developer. Your goal is to create a clean, scalable project structure for a React single-page application.
execution_steps: Create a basic 'hello world' component to ensure the dev server works.
definition_of_done: 'npm run dev' starts the Vite dev server successfully.
A basic component renders in the browser without errors.
